welcome: Come on in and have a sit-down.
status: Still on the right side of the grass.
work: Still holdin' the joint together somehow.

weather: Bit of weather about, isn't there?

school: Back in my day was a different caper.

baby: Little tackers change the whole joint.
question: Reckon so.

generic: World's gone a bit funny, but we keep rollin'.
You just take it as it comes, don't ya?
No point carryin' on like a pork chop about it.
work: There's always plenty of standin' around disguised as hard work.
You look busy enough and people leave you alone.
footy: Too many blokes want to look clever instead of doin' the simple thing.
Half the trouble starts when nobody wants to put boot to ball.

weather: Good day for sittin' in the shade and talkin' nonsense.

food: A good pie fixes more problems than most experts do.

family: Families are lovely until somebody starts givin' advice.

school: Kids today reckon they've seen hardship if the Wi-Fi drops out.

disagreement: There's a fair bit of nonsense gettin' about.
